summary: ALLOWED_EXTS constant defined locally with 7 audio extensions
failure_scenario: Duplicated extension list. No shared constant exists in packages/core or packages/speech. Frontend uses Tauri dialog filters but has no shared extension list. Should define ALLOWED_AUDIO_EXTS in packages/core/src/constants.ts and import in both Rust (via build script or manual sync) and TypeScript.

summary: validate_source function does existence check + extension validation
failure_scenario: No shared path validator exists in codebase. Frontend uses Tauri dialog plugin for file picking (no validation). Could extract to shared util in packages/core/src/validation.ts for TypeScript and a Rust helper in db/ or a new utils module.

summary: Uses std::fs::copy directly for file copy
failure_scenario: No shared file copy wrapper exists. Both Rust and TypeScript use their stdlib (std::fs::copy, fs.promises.copyFile). No abstraction needed - stdlib is sufficient. Ponytail: stdlib does it.
No shared UUID generator exists. Rust uses uuid crate, TypeScript uses crypto.randomUUID(). No abstraction needed - stdlib/crate is appropriate. Ponytail: stdlib/crate does it.

failure_scenario: Already correctly shared. Meeting type defined in packages/core/src/types.ts and used by both Rust (via serde) and TypeScript. Good reuse.

failure_scenario: Already correctly shared. now_iso() in db/mod.rs used by import.rs and other db modules. Good reuse.
Already correctly shared in packages/desktop/src/lib/format.ts and used by frontend routes. No Rust equivalent needed.
